meta.week_number_logic: week_number is determined by counting full weeks since system_start_date (2026-03-16). week_number = ((floor(days_since_start / 7)) % 2 == 0) ? 1 : 2. So weeks 0,2,4... from start = Week 1; weeks 1,3,5... = Week 2. The first 7 days (Mar 16-22) = Week 1.

breakfast.tracking_method: Log the specific breakfast choice made.

lunch_protein.tracking_method: Log the protein choice added to salad.

options: Cooking at home: pasta, rice bowl, steak, salmon
Eating out: restaurant name (Thai, Italian, burger place, etc.)
dinner.tracking_method: Log the general type: home-cooked meal or restaurant. If restaurant, log the name. If home-cooked, log general ingredients (e.g., 'pasta with chicken', 'steak with roasted vegetables').

options: At home: leftovers or fresh meal
lunch_weekend.tracking_method: Log the type: eating out (and restaurant name) or at home (and meal type).

dinner_weekend.tracking_method: Log the type: eating out (and restaurant name) or at home (and meal type).

breakfast_variety.goal: Track 4+ different breakfast types over 2 weeks
breakfast_variety.method: Log each breakfast choice. Aim for variety: eggs, oatmeal, toast, yogurt, etc.
breakfast_variety.notes: Don't track calories or exact portions. Just track the variety of breakfast types.

lunch_protein_variety.method: Log each protein choice: salami, turkey, chicken, cheese. Aim for 3+ different proteins over 2 weeks.
lunch_protein_variety.notes: Base salad stays the same, but protein varies.

dinner_variety.goal: Track 5+ different dinner types or restaurants over 2 weeks
dinner_variety.method: Log each dinner: home-cooked meal or restaurant name. Track the variety of cuisines, restaurants, or home-cooked meal types.
dinner_variety.notes: Goal is not to eat perfectly, but to track variety. Some dinners can be repeat restaurants or meals — just aim for 5+ different types over 2 weeks.

snack_variety.method: Log snack choice: cheese + fruit, yogurt + granola, granola bar. Aim for 2+ different snacks per week.
snack_variety.notes: Simple variety tracking — not about quantity.

weekend_meal_tracking.goal: Track weekend social meals + eating out variety
weekend_meal_tracking.method: Log Saturday lunch, Saturday dinner, Sunday lunch, Sunday dinner. For each: eating out (restaurant name) or at home (meal type). Track restaurants visited.
weekend_meal_tracking.notes: Weekend eating is social + flexible. Goal is to track variety and remember where you went / what you cooked.

Gut Project, 2018.studies: Food variety is linked to gut health and microbiome diversity. Study: 'The Importance of Dietary Diversity to Gut Microbiota' — Gut Project, 2018
Gut Project, 2018.tracking_method: Weekly count — track variety, not specific items.
